text: my insurance denied a claim because i sneezed wrong apparently
i genuinely believed the ice cream truck played music when it was sold out. mom why
airport bathroom tier S. heated seats and no one talks to you
the escalator at nordstrom stopped and i just stood there like it was going to restart. it didnt
something in the break room fridge has been alive since march. we dont open that side anymore
ate shredded cheese over the sink at 2am and my cat watched me like a disappointed parent
drake and josh was a documentary about my relationship with my stepbrother
called in sick then ran into my boss at target. we both pretended it didnt happen
deductible so high i might as well just not have bones
i thought quicksand was gonna be a way bigger problem in adult life
gas station bathroom off i-95 changed me as a person and not for the better
i will ride the escalator and i will hold the railing and i will not look down
the printer on floor 3 makes sounds at night. no one prints at night
just ate cereal for dinner again. the box said family size and im the whole family
zoey 101 predicted nothing but it had vibes and thats enough
told work i had a doctors appt. went to dave and busters for four hours
my health insurance covers 'wellness visits' but not being unwell. make it make sense
parents said the car light being on was illegal. i drove in darkness for years
rest stop in ohio had a chandelier. ohio is unpredictable
stepping onto a moving escalator with a suitcase is my personal everest
the office microwave smells like betrayal and old fish
cold leftover pasta at 1am hits different when youre standing in front of the open fridge
ned's declassified was more useful than any actual school advice i got
faked a cough so good on the phone i almost convinced myself i was dying
copay went up again. at this point just let me google it
believed my dad when he said he'd turn the car around. he never once turned that car around
truck stop bathroom in texas had a jukebox. respect honestly
i take the stairs now. not for health. the escalator won
ceiling tile in conference room B is a different color and everyone ignores it
handful of goldfish crackers at midnight is technically a seafood snack
icarly was a show about child labor and no one questioned it
emailed in sick from the parking lot of a waterpark. no regrets
insurance company put me on hold for 47 minutes then hung up on me
thought adults had it figured out. im an adult now. they absolutely did not
mcdonalds bathroom at 3am is a liminal space and you cannot convince me otherwise
the down escalator at the mall gives me the same energy as a trust fall
we have a ghost in the supply closet. management says its 'drafty' but we know
spooned peanut butter straight from the jar at midnight. jar is now half empty
the suite life of zack and cody taught me more about hotels than any job ever did
told my boss i had food poisoning. was actually at ikea eating meatballs
they said my claim was pre-existing. i didnt exist yet when it started
my mom said if i swallowed gum itd stay in my stomach for 7 years. im still worried
rest area bathroom near denver had art on the walls. real art. framed
escalators that suddenly become stairs are my villain origin story
the lights in the copy room flicker every day at 3:33pm. we timed it
cottage cheese and hot sauce at 2am. dont judge me the fridge was empty
avatar the last airbender is still the peak of western animation and i will not debate this
said i had a flat tire. was actually in bed watching 6 hours of baking shows
insurance wont cover my glasses unless im legally blind. so i just squint now
i genuinely thought teachers lived at school. like slept there and everything
five star review for the bathroom at that one target. hand soap smelled like lavender
i have never once gracefully stepped off an escalator. always a little stumble
someone keeps writing 'let me out' on the whiteboard in room 204. we dont use room 204
dry cereal by the handful at 12:30am. no milk. just vibes
kim possible's ringtone lives in my head rent free and always will
took a sick day for mental health. mental health activity was minigolf
out of network means out of luck apparently. thanks blue cross
believed the pool turned blue if you peed in it until i was like 19
gas station bathroom with no lock. you just have to believe in yourself
getting on an escalator with flip flops is genuinely terrifying
the vending machine on floor 2 takes your money and gives nothing. its possessed
ate an entire sleeve of oreos at 1am standing in the kitchen in the dark
that 70s show had no right being that funny. i wasnt even alive in the 70s
texted my boss 'wont make it in' with no explanation. power move or unemployment speedrun
my premium went up because i went to the doctor. isnt that the whole point
thought if you dug deep enough youd reach china. tried it. reached mud
denny's bathroom at 4am is a no judgment zone and i respect that
why do broken escalators feel so wrong to walk on. theyre just stairs now. but worse
janitor at my old job said he heard typing after midnight. no one works past 6
string cheese and crackers at 3am is a charcuterie board if you believe in yourself
recess was the most politically complex show on disney and no one was ready
called in with a migraine. spent the day at the aquarium looking at jellyfish
dental insurance that covers one cleaning a year. my teeth are on their own
my older cousin told me if i held my breath in a tunnel id get a wish. i still do it
rest stop bathroom on the turnpike had a motivational poster. it said 'believe'. i did not
i treat the escalator handrail like its lava. never touching that thing
the fax machine in the back office turns on by itself at midnight. every night
microwaved a hot dog at 2am and ate it with no bun. rock bottom or peak freedom
malcolm in the middle was just a documentary about being the middle child
said i was at the ER. was at the movies eating popcorn with extra butter
vision insurance doesnt cover the visit to check if you need vision insurance
genuinely thought brown cows made chocolate milk until an embarrassingly late age
ikea bathroom is cleaner than my apartment and im not even mad about it
the gap between escalator steps haunts me. where does it go. what lives down there
motion sensor lights in the hallway dont detect me anymore. am i a ghost
cold pizza slice at midnight is just italian breakfast and im tired of pretending its not
proud family theme song still goes harder than most music released this year
faked losing my voice for two days. my coworker brought me soup. now i feel guilty forever
tried to file a claim online. the website crashed. called them. hold music for an hour
believed the tv would go square shaped if i sat too close. sat far away for years
walmart bathroom review: fluorescent lighting made me question all my life choices
standing at the top of an escalator trying to time my step on is my daily boss fight
the thermostat at work is haunted. set it to 72. comes back to 85. every single time
dipped bread in olive oil at 1am like i was at a restaurant. i was not at a restaurant
even stevens deserved more seasons and i will carry this opinion to my grave
told them i had car trouble. uber'd to brunch with bottomless mimosas
my insurance card has a number on it that no one at the insurance company recognizes
thought stepping on a crack would actually break my moms back. walked so carefully
single stall bathroom with good wifi is the real luxury experience
rode a broken escalator as stairs and still felt wrong about it for the rest of the day
